title_original: IQM, a Global Leader for Quantum Computing, to Become the First Listed European Quantum Company, Through Merger with Real Asset Acquisition Corp. - IQM Quantum Computers
summary_original: IQM Finland Oy announced a merger with Real Asset Acquisition Corp., making IQM the first listed European quantum computing company, with an estimated pre-money equity valuation of approximately 1.8 billion US dollars. After closing, IQM’s cash position is expected to exceed 450 million US dollars. IQM has delivered 15 systems and sold 21 to 13 customers, including four of the top ten global supercomputing centers. Technical achievements include processors with greater than 99.9 percent fidelity for single- and two-qubit gates and readouts. The deal aims to accelerate IQM’s development towards fault-tolerant quantum computing. The merger has been approved by the boards of both companies and awaits shareholder approval and customary closing conditions.
